channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: ComBench: A Benchmark for Rigorous Proof Reasoning and Constructive Realization in Olympiad-Level Combinatorics

item.description: DeNovoSWE: Scaling Long-Horizon Environments for Generating Entire Repositories from Scratch

item.title: Agentic Environment Engineering for Large Language Models: A Survey of Environment Modeling, Synthesis, Evaluation, and Application

item.title: World Pilot: Steering Vision-Language-Action Models with World-Action Priors
item.description: 📄 New in cs.RO — Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models inherit semantic grounding from large-scale pretraining and perform competently across in-distribution manipulation tasks. This grounding, however, is built on static image-text pairs, whereas manipulation is a continuous, contact-rich process whose dynamics th...

item.title: Claw-SWE-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating OpenClaw-style Agent Harnesses on Coding Tasks
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.CL — General-purpose agents such as OpenClaw are increasingly used as autonomous tool users, but their coding ability is difficult to measure under SWE-bench: a generic agent does not by itself satisfy the clean Docker workspace, patch, and prediction contract required for scoring. We introduce Claw-S...

item.title: Redesign Mixture-of-Experts Routers with Manifold Power Iteration
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.AI — Router is the cornerstone component to the Mixture-of-Experts models. Serving as expert proxies, the rows of the router matrix compute their similarity to the MoE inputs to determine which subset of experts is activated. Ideally, each router row is designed to encode the expert matrix into this r...

item.title: Verifiable Environments Are LEGO Bricks: Recursive Composition for Reasoning Generalization
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL — Reinforcement Learning (RL) with verifiable environments has emerged as a powerful approach for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). While prior research demonstrates that scaling environment quantity improves RL performance, existing manual or individual construc...

item.title: Breaking Entropy Bounds: Accelerating RL Training via MTP with Rejection Sampling
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.CL — Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key component in modern large language models, yet the rollout stage remains the key bottleneck in RL training pipelines. Although Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) offers a natural solution to accelerate rollouts through speculative decoding, many studies have...

item.title: What Uncertainties Do We Need for Dynamical Systems?
item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (45 comments) — The distinction between aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty has received considerable attention in machine learning research, mainly in the context of supervised learning but also in other settings such as generative modeling. In this paper, we offer a machine learning perspective on uncertainty ...

item.title: "That's AI Slop, You Bot!" Studying Accusations, Evidence, and Credibility in Online Discourse Towards LLM-Generated Comments
item.description: 📄 New in cs.SI, cs.AI — Generative AI has made fluent prose cheap to produce, breaking the old promise to readers that good writing meant real thinking. How have readers responded, and what can this tell us about changing anti-AI attitudes? We analyzed 25 million comments from Hacker News and Reddit (2023-2026), combini...

item.title: BerriAI / litellm
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (500 comments) · 🔥 Trending on HN (938 pts) — Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

item.title: Andyyyy64 / whichllm
item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (68 comments) · ⭐ 479 GitHub stars today — Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

item.title: mvanhorn / last30days-skill
item.description: ⭐ 2.5k GitHub stars today · ⭐ 39.4k total stars — AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

item.title: Managing AI Chat History — Part II: From Naive Storage to Intelligent Memory

item.title: comet-ml / opik
item.description: ⭐ 44 stars today on GitHub · ⭐ 19.6k total stars — Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

item.title: harry0703 / MoneyPrinterTurbo
item.description: ⭐ 1.4k GitHub stars today · ⭐ 85.5k total stars — 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
